comment.body: The funny thing is, alma can’t win in this situation. If the market falls, people like you will say she called both directions, so she’s right either way. If the market short-squeezes, you unsubscribe and say a hundred times that she was wrong. That’s paradoxical logic. In any case, this isn’t a sports-betting game, it’s a game of probabilities, a game of risk management
